_comment: Free-tier rate limits per model, keyed by the REAL API model identifier (as returned by the v1beta models endpoint). Human-editable reference data -- the SDK/API has NO endpoint to query these, so they are read from the AI Studio dashboard (https://aistudio.google.com/rate-limit) and recorded here. Google changes free-tier limits server-side without notice; update this file when the dashboard shows different, or when a 429 reconciles the truth. Limits are per-Google-Cloud-PROJECT, not per-key. rpm=requests/min, tpm=tokens/min (input), rpd=requests/day; null=unlimited or unknown. Only rpd is enforced by the budget sidecar in v1; rpm/tpm are recorded for reference.
_thinking_comment: thinking: per-model reasoning control for the generateContent API. kind=level (named thinkingLevel string, Gemini-3 family) | budget (integer thinkingBudget, Gemini-2.5 family -- none curated yet) | none (no thinking control -- Gemma rejects both params). available=accepted levels (API-PROBED 2026-06-03 against :generateContent). default=OUR chosen default sent when a caller specifies no level (our policy, may differ from the model's own default). model_default=Google's own server default (from https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/thinking#levels-budgets, 2026-06-03) -- recorded as provenance to show where we deliberately diverge (e.g. flash-lite: we send medium, Google defaults minimal). Gemma 'none' verified by direct generateContent probe rejecting both thinkingLevel and thinkingBudget.
_source: AI Studio dashboard, read manually 2026-06-02; thinking data API-probed + doc-sourced 2026-06-03
